headline: Bitcoin Plunges to $62K on Fed Risk-Off sentiment.

article.title: Bitcoin peels back to $62K as Fed-wary futures traders cut risk: Is the BTC rally over?
article.summary: Bitcoin hovered around the $62,000 mark following a spike in oil prices, escalating hot war in Iran and traders’ move to cut risk ahead of a Federal Reserve policy statement.

headline: Bitcoin Treasury Firm Renegotiates $100M Cantor SPAC Deal

article.title: Adam Back’s Bitcoin treasury company seeks new terms with Cantor for SPAC merger
article.summary: The Bitcoin Standard Treasury Company and Cantor Equity Partners I announced that they were looking into amending the terms of a 2025 merger deal that “better reflected market conditions.”

article.title: Stocks Fall as US-Iran Jitters Spur Rally in Oil: Markets Wrap
article.summary: A flare-up in geopolitical risks sent stocks and bonds lower as oil jumped after President Donald Trump said a ceasefire with Iran may be over, adding the US would probably launch further strikes.

article.title: US Two-Year Yield Near 2026 High in Global Bond Selloff
article.summary: The two-year US Treasury yield climbed back toward last month’s peak amid a selloff in global bond markets as rising oil prices rekindled worries about inflation.

headline: CFTC Nears Clarity Act by August 1 Deadline

article.title: CFTC Chair Says Clarity Act Is ‘So Close’ As August Deadline Nears
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

CFTC Chair Says Clarity Act Is ‘So Close’ As August Deadline Nears
CFTC Chairman Michael Selig urged Congress to pass the Clarity Act before the August recess, saying the crypto market-structure bill is "so close" despite ongoing disputes over ethics and stablecoin provisions.

headline: Bitcoin ETFs Hemorrhage $8 Billion in Record Outflows

article.title: Bitcoin ETFs 'Turning a Corner' After Record Bleed Hits $8 Billion
article.summary: Investors had backed away from Bitcoin since mid-May.

headline: $85 Turns to $2M on Robinhood Crypto Trade

article.title: Lucky Trader Turns $85 Into $2 Million on Robinhood Chain Meme Coin
article.summary: The meme coin CashCat on Robinhood Chain is the latest flavor of the hour, and one trader has turned a mini-investment into a small fortune in less than three weeks.

headline: Block Pays $45M Over False Security Claims

article.title: Cash App owner Block to pay $45 million after states say it made false security promises
article.summary: Block Inc. has agreed to pay $45 million to settle allegations brought by regulators in nearly every U.S. state.

article.title: Paradigm raises $1.2 billion fourth fund, expanding beyond crypto into AI and robotics
article.summary: Crypto venture firm Paradigm has raised its fourth fund, a $1.2 billion vehicle that will invest in crypto, AI, robotics, and other startups.

headline: Oil Surges 5% on Renewed Iran Tensions

article.title: Trump says ceasefire with Iran is ‘over’ and warns of further strikes
article.summary: Oil surges more than 8 per cent to exceed $80 a barrel after US president says negotiating with Tehran is a ‘waste of time’

headline: Oil Surges 5% Amid US-Iran Escalation Fears

article.title: Why the US and Iran are stuck in a cycle of tit-for-tat strikes
article.summary: Trump’s push to get ships moving through the Strait of Hormuz keeps colliding with Tehran’s resistance to cede control
